title: grewia helicterifolia
intro: Grewia helicterifolia, also known as the Indian hawthorn, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Grewia helicterifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or paste, and is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
